response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and technically skilled individual contributor with strong backend and distributed systems expertise. However, he completely lacks the executive leadership background required for a CTO role, notably missing the hard requirement of 5+ years in senior technical leadership scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers. Furthermore, his exposure to agentic AI and fintech is limited to brief individual contributor roles, falling short of the deep architectural and regulatory experience necessary to lead an AI-native fintech scale-up.
strengths: Extensive 18+ year engineering background with hands-on expertise in backend development, microservices, and event-driven architectures.
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain high-throughput systems, such as handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Strong commitment to software craftsmanship, TDD, and open-source development, evidencing high technical standards.
concerns: Zero executive leadership experience; lacks the required track record of scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people.
Insufficient production experience with multi-agent AI systems, having only brief recent exposure to AI tooling rather than deep ML/LLM architecture.
Lacks architectural leadership experience in regulated fintech environments, credit risk, or algorithmic capital management.
